PY
> import sys
> import grpc
> from concurrent import futures
>
> # Attempt robust imports to handle hyphenated proto filename
> pb2 = None
> pb2_grpc = None
>
> try:
>     import kv_store_pb2 as pb2
>     import kv_store_pb2_grpc as pb2_grpc
> except ModuleNotFoundError:
>     try:
>         import kv__store_pb2 as pb2
>         import kv__store_pb2_grpc as pb2_grpc
>     except ModuleNotFoundError:
>         import glob
>         import importlib.util
>         def load_module_by_path(path, name):
>             spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(name, path)
>             mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
>             spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
>             return mod
>         base = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
>         pb2_candidates = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(base, '*_pb2.py')))
>         pb2_grpc_candidates = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(base, '*_pb2_grpc.py')))
>         if not pb2_candidates or not pb2_grpc_candidates:
>             raise RuntimeError('Generated protobuf files not found in /app')
>         # Prefer files with 'store' in the name
>         def pick(cands, needle):
>             for p in cands:
>                 if needle in os.path.basename(p):
>                     return p
>             return cands[0]
>         pb2_path = pick(pb2_candidates, 'store')
>         pb2_grpc_path = pick(pb2_grpc_candidates, 'store')
>         pb2 = load_module_by_path(pb2_path, 'pb2')
>         pb2_grpc = load_module_by_path(pb2_grpc_path, 'pb2_grpc')
>
> class Server(pb2_grpc.KVStoreServicer):
>     def __init__(self):
>         self.store = {}
>
>     def GetVal(self, request, context):
>         val = int(self.store.get(request.key, 0))
>         return pb2.GetValResponse(val=val)
>
>     def SetVal(self, request, context):
>         self.store[request.key] = int(request.val)
>         return pb2.SetValResponse(val=int(request.val))
>
>
> def serve():
>     server = grpc.server(futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=10))
>     pb2_grpc.add_KVStoreServicer_to_server(Server(), server)
>     port = '5328'
>     server.add_insecure_port(f'[::]:{port}')
>     server.start()
>     print(f'KVStore server listening on port {port}', flush=True)
>     server.wait_for_termination()
>
> if __name__ == '__main__':
>     serve()
